case_title: AVRAM GANON VS. MOSHE HAKIM et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, SHORT CAUSE TRIAL SET FOR MAR-19-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON NOV-18-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
